texto: Yet people are still showing up to lift their hands after all these years even though the church is flawed and broken and beautiful and has a shameful, ugly side to it that I'll bet it wishes it didn't have and repeatedly tries to hide.Just like me.Just like you.Just like always.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Max Andrew Dubinsky: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Yet people are still showing up to lift their hands after all these years even though the church …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, christianity, church pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de church e thought-provoking.
